name: career.grc.risk_screener
description: Screens GRC, risk, compliance, audit, SOC 2, NIST, controls, and security analyst roles against Osman's Security+/CySA+ background.

message.description: GRC, risk, compliance, audit, or security role text to evaluate.

examples: is this GRC analyst role a fit?
does this compliance analyst role match Security+ and CySA+?
what resume angle should I use for this SOC 2 role?
purpose: Determine whether a GRC, IT risk, compliance, controls, SOC 2, NIST, RMF, ISO 27001, audit evidence, policy, or security analyst role is a realistic fit, and distinguish true IT/security GRC from finance risk, legal compliance, and senior audit ownership roles.
whenToUse: The listing mentions GRC, governance, risk, compliance, SOC 2, NIST CSF, NIST 800-53, RMF, ISO 27001, controls testing, audit evidence, policy, or compliance analyst work.
The user asks whether a GRC/risk/compliance/security analyst role fits Security+, CySA+, SOC, IT support, or early-career cybersecurity goals.
The request needs a distinction between true IT/security GRC and finance risk, legal compliance, senior audit, or non-technical compliance roles.
The user asks for a GRC resume angle, missing skills, framework gaps, or apply/maybe/skip recommendation.
The job is a role listing and should pair with Job Application Ops for application workflow.
whenNotToUse: Do not use as primary for general job ops with no GRC, IT risk, controls, audit, compliance, or security governance content.
Do not use for pure finance risk, credit risk, legal compliance, or privacy-law roles without IT/security overlap.
Do not use for senior audit manager, director, principal, CPA-only, CISA-only, or CISSP-only roles unless the user wants a quick skip rationale.
Do not use to draft recruiter outreach as primary when the main task is writing tone.
requiredContext: Role title, company, seniority, required years, and must-have certifications.
Whether the role involves IT/security controls, audit evidence, frameworks, policy, risk assessment, or pure non-technical compliance.
Known tools/frameworks in the listing such as SOC 2, NIST, RMF, ISO 27001, GRC platforms, SIEM, IAM, or cloud.
User goal: apply/maybe/skip, resume angle, skill gap analysis, or job application workflow.
missingContextQuestions: Can you paste the listing or the responsibilities and requirements section?
Does the role mention IT/security controls, SOC 2, NIST, RMF, ISO 27001, audit evidence, or policy work?
What seniority and hard requirements are listed?
Do you want a GRC fit score only or a full Apply/Maybe/Skip job plan?

outputContract.format: Role category -> Fit score -> True GRC vs other risk -> Why it fits -> Risks/seniority -> Resume angle -> Missing skills -> Apply/Maybe/Skip.
mustInclude: Whether the role is true IT/security GRC, finance risk, legal compliance, senior audit, or entry-level analyst.
Concrete match to Security+, CySA+, SOC, IT support, or cybersecurity goals when relevant.
Framework or tool gaps such as SOC 2, NIST, RMF, ISO 27001, controls testing, audit evidence, IAM, or GRC platforms.
Resume angle and next learning priority.
mustAvoid: Do not treat every risk/compliance role as cybersecurity GRC.
Do not invent audit, framework, policy, or control-testing experience.
Do not ignore hard seniority or certification requirements.
Do not send outreach or update trackers.
Do not bury a clear Skip recommendation when the role is not aligned.

safetyRules: Keep the screen read-only unless paired with a job application action that requires approval.
Do not invent user experience with frameworks, audits, or tools.
Flag seniority, certification, legal, finance, and non-security mismatches clearly.
Prefer true IT/security GRC evidence over keyword-only matches.
Pair with Job Application Ops for resume/outreach/tracker actions.
approvalRequiredFor: Saving durable memory about role status
positiveExamples: Score this GRC internship against my Security+ and CySA+ background.
Does this SOC 2 compliance analyst role fit me?
Is this NIST 800-53 controls testing job true cybersecurity GRC?
What resume angle should I use for this ISO 27001 risk analyst role?
Is this third-party risk analyst job too senior?
This risk job looks okay. Should I apply?
negativeExamples: Can I use this I-9 receipt for Section 2?
Make this text message sound flirty-light.
Write a ticket note for Active Directory password reset.

evaluationPrompts.input: Score this GRC internship against my Security+ and CySA+ background.
Does this SOC 2 compliance analyst role fit me?
Is this NIST 800-53 controls testing job true cybersecurity GRC?
evaluationPrompts.reason: Positive NIST controls testing and true GRC distinction.

evaluationPrompts.input: What resume angle should I use for this ISO 27001 risk analyst role?
evaluationPrompts.reason: Positive ISO 27001 risk analyst resume angle.

evaluationPrompts.input: Is this third-party risk analyst job too senior?
evaluationPrompts.reason: Positive third-party risk and seniority screen.

evaluationPrompts.input: I need a safe HR reply about an I-9 document.
Make this recruiter email less robotic.
evaluationPrompts.reason: Negative writing/tone request without GRC screen.

evaluationPrompts.input: Write a VPN troubleshooting ticket note.
This risk job looks okay. Should I apply?
evaluationPrompts.reason: Ambiguous risk role; should ask whether it is IT/security GRC or finance/legal risk.

evaluationPrompts.input: Can you screen this compliance analyst role?
evaluationPrompts.reason: Ambiguous compliance role; needs listing details and IT/security distinction.

evaluationPrompts.input: Score this GRC internship and tell me whether to apply.
evaluationPrompts.reason: Multi-skill: GRC should be primary and Job Application Ops should support.
